title: Medieval Spears
description: Transforms the new Spear into a more historically inspired, medieval design. carefully crafted to match Minecraft’s vanilla style. No gameplay changes. (1.21.11)
body:
**This simple, minimalistic resource pack retextures the new Spear weapon into a more _medievally_ accurate design**, giving it a stronger resemblance to a traditional sword.
The texture has been carefully adjusted to remain as close to vanilla Minecraft’s art style as possible, ensuring it blends seamlessly with existing in-game textures.
This pack is purely visual and does not affect gameplay in any way.
Compatible only with _Minecraft 1.21.11_
